CustomField.description: Scrubbed, truncated evidence dump. Processed by SecScanEvidenceUtil: max 10,000 chars, regex-scrubbed for password/token/key patterns. Never stores full raw Apex source bodies.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically scrubbed technical evidence captured at scan time. Passwords, tokens, and secret-pattern strings are masked with asterisks. For regex-based findings, captures up to 5,000 chars before and after the match (10,000 total). Never contains full raw Apex source bodies.
CustomField.label: Raw Evidence
